creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 211971
svn diff for databases/pgworksheet

databases/pgworksheet was unfairly targeted for EOL
because it uses python27. Granted, python2 is slated
for removal for good reason. But it's not slated for
EOL on 2020-03-01. So I'm removing the EOL on
databases/pgworksheet, and taking measures to permit
the build on python3.

The svn(1) diff(1) attached removes DEPRECIATED
&& EXPIRATION_DATE

CHANGES
Makefile

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
